meaning: ware[总称](日本)唐津瓷器(7 世纪时开始在九州岛唐津市制造的一种传统瓷器)
examples: Saga is a famous Japanese ceramic village, northwest of Arita, Imari, Karatsu are world famous pottery origin.
Imari, Arita porcelain is characterized by fine polished, Karatsu ceramics are simple, deep, these are the highest level in the Japanese ceramic works.
Should the project get the nod from the politicos, work will begin on joining the southwestern Japanese city of Karatsu with the south Korean port of Busan with a 79-mile (128-km) train tunnel.
